description: Registry of every web game built by gh-game-factory. Never duplicate an entry — check name, description, category, and genre before building.

games.name: hexbloom
games.description: Turn-based hex-grid area control: pick a colour to recolour your territory and absorb every touching tile of it; largest territory when the board fills wins.

games.name: cipher-clash
games.description: Boggle-style word-grid race; drag touching letters to spell words, and in versus a word only scores for whoever claims it first.
